zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Rantlina de Blois於大約0978年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，她的父親Martin de Rennes41歲，母親Rantlina De Vitre21歲。她於0997年與Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan在法國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於從1015年到1060年在法國布列塔尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Rantlina de Blois于大约0978年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷时，她的父亲Martin de Rennes41岁，母亲Rantlina De Vitre21岁。她于0997年与Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan在法国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于从1015年到1060年在法国布列塔尼。

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Rantlina de Blois was born about 0978, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Martin de Rennes, was 41 and her mother, Rantlina De Vitre, was 21. She married Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan in 0997, in France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died from 1015 to 1060, in Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Rantlina de Blois est née environ 0978, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Martin de Rennes, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Rantlina De Vitre, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan en 0997, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée du 1015 au 1060, à Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Rantlina de Blois um 0978 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Martin de Rennes 41 und ihre Mutter Rantlina De Vitre 21. Sie hat 0997 in Frankreich Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb von 1015 bis 1060 in Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Rantlina de Blois è nata il circa 0978 nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Martin de Rennes, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Rantlina De Vitre, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan nel 0997, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì da 1015 a 1060, nel Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Rantlina de Bloisが約0978年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで生まれた時，父Martin de Rennesは41歳，母Rantlina De Vitreは21歳であった。0997年にフランスでHammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1015年まで1060年にフランスブレタグンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Rantlina de Blois(이)가 대략 0978년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Martin de Rennes(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rantlina De Vitre(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 0997년 프랑스에서 Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1015년 부터 1060년 까지 프랑스 브레타그니에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Rantlina de Blois nasceu aproximadamente 0978, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Martin de Rennes, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Rantlina De Vitre, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan em 0997, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu de 1015 a 1060, em Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Rantlina de Blois родилась около 0978 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Martin de Rennes было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Rantlina De Vitre, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan в 0997 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла с 1015 по 1060 в местности бретагн, Франция.

sm.about 978–from 1015 to 1060: e tusa o le 0978–mai le 1015 e o'o I le 1060

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Rantlina de Blois nació aproximadamente 0978, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Martin de Rennes, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Rantlina De Vitre, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan en 0997, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió desde 1015 hasta 1060, en Bretagne, Francia.
